queue.expected_value: Unblocks finetuned checkpoint deployment decision. Clean (no-attack) baseline is the only missing piece preventing a full pass on the adversarial finetuning A/B eval. Run both checkpoints (dpc_unet_final_golden.pt and dpc_unet_adversarial_finetuned.pt) and compare mAP50.
queue.stop_condition: Single run sufficient — compare the two checkpoints and record delta.
queue.risk_note: Finetuned checkpoint has CONDITIONAL PASS on attacked conditions only. This run is required before any deployment decision. Use DPC_UNET_CHECKPOINT_PATH env var to switch checkpoints between runs.

queue.expected_value: Confirms whether finetuned checkpoint advantage holds under harder deepfool config (current Phase 4 tuned params used eps=0.1; A/B delta was only +0.006). Stronger epsilon should widen the performance gap if finetuning is genuinely effective.
queue.stop_condition: Stop if defended mAP50 under deepfool eps=0.15 drops below 0.15 — at that point the defense is no longer viable regardless of checkpoint.
queue.risk_note: deepfool damage at eps=0.1 was 63.6%. eps=0.15 may saturate. Compare only against same-param baseline to avoid comparability issues.

queue.expected_value: Upgrades dispersion_reduction Phase 4 result from 50-image cap to full 500-image dataset. Current recovery_pct of +7.0% for c_dog is based on a small sample and is not directly comparable to deepfool results.
queue.stop_condition: Single full-dataset run sufficient to resolve the image count mismatch anomaly.
queue.risk_note: dispersion_reduction estimated at ~30s/image — 500 images is approximately 4.2h NUC CPU. Run overnight. Current 50-image result (recovery +7.0%) may shift significantly at full scale.

queue.expected_value: Probes whether square attack is genuinely bounded at eps=0.3 or whether coordinate descent hit the search wall. If eps=0.4 increases damage substantially, expand eps_max in the next tune phase.
queue.stop_condition: If mAP50 drop at eps=0.4 is less than 3 percentage points larger than at eps=0.3, the bound is not a meaningful gap.
queue.risk_note: Parameter bound hit detected: square eps=0.3 was the configured max in Phase 4. This run requires manually overriding eps beyond the current auto_cycle bounds.
